finding: The atomic deployment-evidence finalizer existed but the authoritative workflow still lacked a deterministic, fail-closed wiring route.

behavior: inserts the finalizer contract test into the workflow test gate
adds the verified manifest to the uploaded artifact set
adds the manifest contract to the run summary
fails closed when expected workflow anchors drift

verification.route: isolated Node 22-compatible runtime using source-equivalent committed module and test contents

evidence_strength: deterministic transformation behavior; authoritative workflow not yet rewritten or executed
privacy_boundary: No secret values, account identifiers, private health material, or raw user content are read or emitted.
limits: The Cloudflare deployment remains blocked until valid environment credentials are configured.
This artifact provides a deterministic reversible wiring operation but does not itself prove a deployment or resolving hostname.
The authoritative workflow still requires application of the rewriter and a trusted workflow run.
rollback: Revert the wiring commit or restore the prior workflow file; the rewriter never deletes evidence or Git history.
